summary: The conversation is between a customer and a representative from BMW Motorrad Kolkata. The customer inquires about the location of the showroom, the availability of off-roading bikes, and their prices. The representative provides the necessary information and answers the customer's questions. The customer expresses interest in purchasing a bike and asks about the availability of a specific model.

key_discussion_points.details: The showroom is located near Bishwo Bangla, opposite West Bengal's Westin Hotel, and can be accessed through the service road at Eco Park gate number one.
The available models for off-roading are the 900 GS, with prices starting from 18 lakhs. The top model is around 20-26 lakhs.
The on-road price of the 900 GS is roughly 19 lakhs.
The customer can visit the showroom to see the available bikes, and the representative mentions that there is a C-pad 850 and another 870 model available.
A new model, the 450, will be launched next year.

action_items.task: Visit the showroom to see the available bikes
